---
title: "Continuum Mechanics: From Fundamentals to Biological Tissue"
subtitle: "PHYS-001 | Track F — Physical Systems"
description: "The mathematical theory of continuous media: solids, fluids, and biological tissues. Provides the unified framework for biomechanics, fluid dynamics, and any model involving deformable bodies."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Continuum Mechanics: From Fundamentals to Biological Tissue

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
